goal: Build a consistent beginner strength routine
exercise: Goblet squat, incline push-up, seated row
pain_response: No pain reported during the session; mild general fatigue noted after the final set.
trainer_memo: Keep tempo slow and reinforce breathing cues before increasing load.

goal: Improve movement confidence for daily activity
exercise: Step-up, cable press, hip hinge drill
pain_response: Member reported brief discomfort awareness during step-ups, which decreased after range adjustment.
trainer_memo: Use a lower step height and monitor comfort response during warm-up sets.

exercise: Bike intervals, band pull-apart, dead bug
pain_response: No pain reported; breathing effort increased during the final bike interval.
trainer_memo: Keep intervals short and add recovery time if form quality changes.
